reviews.review_description: Okay so I REALLY love this game it’s just the boss makes me feel like I’m not in control no more a little bit also could you add some baby’s and kids and animals please that also come in to the store that would be so fun in my opinion and they can also be with parents and the pets can be with their owner I love this game so much you don’t even understand please try to add those!

I like this game, but there are a few fixes needed. Get rid of the boss or have the option to turn him off. He is very annoying. Need an option to upgrade the nasty bathroom. The bathroom walls and floors should've updated when the shop walls and floors were updated. Bathroom walls should be editable to remove unwanted paintings and graffiti. 

I originally reported not being able to stack carts, but that feature started back working. Not sure what happened to make it work again.

I originally reported not hearing the customers and boss, but I toggled the buttons on the radio and now the sound is there. User error I believe.

Hole in the wall between the office and toilet. They say "this ia not a museum" and "I hope you like what you can see"

You can make people eat poo and they vomit 

Not G rated
Okay to start I just love how this game has such a great quality and the best part is I love how you can like level up I’m in the food category
um the guy who keeps um going around telling you to do things i don't like it i would rather be like how i used to be without him because it was a lot more funer when he was not there
Idk why everyone is complaining about the boss like I just put him in the bin and he dissappear forever

But the new boss makes me feel like it's not my store anymore. The fun part was being in control; now you've taken that away. The other additions to the game, like the flies and dirt on the floor, just make the game annoying rather than fun. 

The intimidating boss is too much and this game keeps getting worse.
Ok so the game is fun and all but thaer is not alot of space like i can't do a good revamp of the store with out running out of space
I like that they talk and i can push and feed people flies its just fun
this game was worth the money.

reviews.review_title: I thought the boss was bad ...
reviews.review_description:
Didn't like the boss addition... then to
make it worse, the costumers had to start getting inc the register constantly...
Like other people have said, the boss needs to have an option to turn on or off. Some people seem to like him but it seems the majority do not. Other than that, love the game.

Just updating this from a 5 star review to a 2 star. I really don’t like the changes that were made with the new boss update. I had purchased the biggest
 store upgrade however with the new boss update you lose all the space you had purchased and the boss is a really big jerk. Why I spent money just to unlock him is a mystery to me. Unfortunately I don’t see me playing this anymore at this time. 

Time will tell if the game gets better.

I play shop games on ps5 and I was playing shave and stuff when I saw this and I was HYPED so I instantly got it and it’s FUN
Good game

I love the game play.  With that said, it would be even better if there was an option to hire workers. Hire security.  Do something about the continuous flies. And if an object is purchased in error, a sell option.

UPDATE
The recent boss update would be better if  the boss feature was able to be toggled on or off. Otherwise, customers trip over him, he hits you with the bat randomly for apparently no reason, and hitting him back just causes him to continue to come at you endlessly.  I had a thief get away because the boss hit me as I was running towards the door.  Good game, but still needs work

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your thoughts and suggestions — we’re really glad you’re enjoying Shop & Stuff 🙌

We appreciate you taking the time to point these things out. Feedback like this is super valuable to us. If you’d like to share more ideas or stay in the loop, feel free to join our Discord 💙 discord.hypervr.games

reviews.review_title: This game is super fun to play
reviews.review_description:
This game is probably my new favorite game since you can obviously make your own store and expand it I love how I can just smack the customers with a spatula it’s funny as heck. 

Also do you think you could add more bathrooms cause there’s only 1 maybe there’s more but I’m only on day 5.

Also I like how every day you get new items and money cause the game would be boring if you just started with everything 

This game gets a 10/10 

Psttt also maybe add shopping cart 

Thanks for reading!
Great game get it I rate it 5 stars
j
Jby
Is there a way to change if you get a boss or not
it's actually really fun it's just a big guy pisses me off they could have gotten an option to let him stay here or not
It’s kind of good I’ve got reset. I mean it was kind of funny. I got the haircut one but it still hasn’t came for it yet at least four stars.

The game is good and it is very fun to play! But the boss would be better off with a off and on switch because he hits you for no reason and trips over customers and makes them mad. The items are good no glitches, but I would be SUPER happy if you add a security guard and more restockers and MAYBE a gasoline pump for the cars and the customers can pay to gasoline pumps. I wish you guys could add a basement for the customers so they can go down there and get more food. The game is good and i recommend you guys to add bigger market space MAYBE a upstairs OR even a food area like a cooking space like a irl store (Wawa), you guys can add a slushy machine, freezer, mini fast food restaurant inside the store, and so on!!!

4/5 Good Game ! Recommended !

developer_response.body:
Hi! It sounds like the in-game sound might be turned off. Try finding the radio on the table (at the start of the game it’s behind the manual checkout in the corner) and make sure the sound button is turned on.

If this fixes the problem for you, we’d really appreciate it if you could update your review. It helps the game a lot! 🙏

developer_response.body: Hi there! In order to save your progress you need to open a shop and play the whole day through. After you finish the shift, your progress is automatically saved

reviews.review_title: Fun! Just waiting on more updates
reviews.review_description: I played for about 10+ hours and it's pretty fun! I love the art style and the gameplay is smooth. After a while you kinda run out of stuff to do aside from restocking and cleaning up after customers. I'm on level 20 and stopped achieving more items so now it's pretty repetitive. Just waiting on more updates!

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you so much for a positive review, your feedback helps us keep going and improve! Shop & Sell is still in Early Access, which means you’ve reached the current content cap — but we’re actively developing more items, systems, and features to keep your shop life fresh and exciting. If you’d like to get sneak peeks at what’s coming, join our Discord community discord.hypervr.games
